blockingIssues.description: src/screens/GenerationProgressScreen.tsx still hardcodes 3 progress phases while the feature contract for create-fidelity requires a 4-phase generation-progress flow in /demo/create-generation-progress.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md with factual guidance that igloo-paper screen folders may have numeric prefixes (e.g., shared/2-create-profile) and should be discovered by listing flow directories first.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve the create-generation-progress phase-count inconsistency so feature requirements and design source of truth agree (features.json currently requires 4 phases while Paper and existing validation references indicate 3).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review create-fidelity found a blocking mismatch: features.json expectedBehavior requires 4 phases, while igloo-paper create generation screen and handoff evidence are 3-phase.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify ui-builder guidance for TDD ordering (strictly enforce tests-first or relax wording to reflect allowed iterative workflows), to reduce repeat reviewer observations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: shared-create-profile-fidelity review observed code edits happened before new tests despite ui-builder SKILL.md prescribing tests-first workflow.
